final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-style infographic for Chinese ethnic minority costume (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "国家博物馆展板" museum exhibition panel aesthetic — references in the spirit of 故宫博物院文物图录, 国家博物馆常设展展板设计, 日本东京国立博物馆民族服饰图鉴; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be fixed layout with top header area (main title + subtitle + intro), left structural breakdown zone with Chinese callout lines and detail close-ups, upper-right material/texture zone with real fabric swatches, middle-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color swatches and cultural explanations, bottom wearing-order flowchart + core feature summary
Subject: must include a full-body figure wearing authentic Chinese ethnic minority costume as central subject, or central object breakdown if subject is better suited to artifact focus
Scene/backdrop: must be paper-textured background in rice white, silk paper white, or light tea color with subtle paper grain
Lighting/mood: needs a museum display lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be restrained and professional with museum-grade color control, avoiding oversaturation
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric textures (silk, brocade, embroidery, metal ornaments, leather, wool) with authentic material swatches
Text (verbatim): must include Chinese main title, subtitle, intro text, structural labels, material descriptions, pattern explanations, color meanings, and core feature summary — all in simplified Chinese
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve authentic structural accuracy of Chinese ethnic minority costume; must avoid poster/photography studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics; must ensure legible Chinese characters without garbled text or pinyin; must maintain encyclopedic, collectible, professional museum quality
Avoid: must avoid poster aesthetic, photography studio aesthetic, e-commerce product page aesthetic, anime illustration aesthetic, cosplay aesthetic, incorrect labeling, wrong structural information, illegible text, fake materials, excessive decoration
